name: Sweet and Hot Chili Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 small Fresh Chilies, seeded and finely sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a saucepan.
2. Mix well, then bring to a boil over high heat.
3. Cook until the mixture is reduced by half.
4. Remove from heat and cover.
5. Store in the refrigerator until ready to use.
